title: ProAngyDimit's Resources
description: ProAngyDimit's resource pack! Mainly intended for Bed Wars.
body:
![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7c3dD7uK/images/cc1e1de4e6bf50fbb8dc6df68860a8a44f71e589.png)
ProAngyDimit's resource pack! Mostly intended for Bed Wars. It changes things like tools, wood, wool, diamonds, emeralds, armor, beds and the enchantment glint.
